infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: GhostEye uses location-gated WiFi network metadata only for authorized owned-router observation sessions.
infoPlist.NSMotionUsageDescription: GhostEye uses device motion to classify whether the phone is stable during authorized WiFi observation sessions.
infoPlist.NSLocalNetworkUsageDescription: GhostEye can probe an authorized owned router on the local network when configured by the user.
